text.title: bun-runtime Core Rules
text.summary: Six testable rules for greenfield Bun-based JS/TS services.

rule.statement: Pin the Bun version in package.json `packageManager` field AND in CI via `oven-sh/setup-bun@v2` with explicit `bun-version`. Never use 'latest'.
rule.rationale: Reproducibility requires identical Bun versions across developer machines, CI, and production containers. LLMs default to 'latest' which breaks builds across teams when Bun releases a non-backwards-compatible change.

rule.statement: Define `dev`, `start`, `test`, and `build` scripts in package.json. Use `bun --watch` for dev (full restart), not `bun --hot` (persists state).
rule.rationale: --hot keeps top-level singletons alive across reloads; edited config does not take effect until a full restart. --watch ensures clean module reloads.

rule.statement: Set `frozen-lockfile = true` under `[install]` in bunfig.toml. Enable coverage under `[test]`.
rule.rationale: Frozen lockfile in CI detects lockfile drift (identical semantics to npm ci). Coverage flag avoids ad-hoc instrumentation.

rule.statement: Set `moduleResolution: "bundler"` in tsconfig.json. Required for Bun's native module resolution.
rule.rationale: Bun handles modern resolution natively; 'bundler' mode enables Bun-specific path resolution without ts-node shims.

rule.statement: Use `Bun.serve` (or a framework like Hono on top of it) for HTTP servers. Do not use `node:http` when running on Bun.
rule.rationale: Bun.serve is measurably faster than node:http for I/O-heavy routes due to JavaScriptCore optimisations. The API is web-standard (Request → Response) and edge-compatible.

rule.statement: Use `Bun.file()` for static reads. Lazy-loaded and faster than `fs.readFileSync`.
rule.rationale: Bun.file returns a lazy Blob; data is read only when `.text()`/`.json()`/`.arrayBuffer()` is called.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r1-explicit-trigger' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r2-bounded-output' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r3-evidence-anchored' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.
